visualizations.title: Simplification Rule
visualizations.description: The math equation showing how to simplify a fraction by dividing by the Greatest Common Divisor.

steps.explanation: Greatest Common Divisor: The largest positive integer that divides both the numerator n and the denominator d without leaving a remainder.
Dividing both parts by the GCD scales the numbers down to their smallest possible whole-number values, keeping the fraction equivalent.

visualizations.title: Simplifying 8/12 to 2/3
visualizations.description: Watch 12 squares group into 3 larger columns, showing that shading 8/12 is identical to shading 2/3.
